Valeriana officinalis, commonly known as Vauanthes filiformis, is a perennial flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae. The health benefits of Valeriana officinalis include its ability to promote relaxation, reduce anxiety and stress, and improve sleep quality due to its sedative properties. The bioactive constituents of Valeriana officinalis include valepotriates, valerenic acid, and valeoptenate, which have been shown to have a calming effect on the nervous system. The most common herbal preparations made with Valeriana officinalis include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of insomnia and restlessness.
